label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of an entity's business strategy

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Expert prediction of entity's long-term survival or competitive outcome

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome for an entity or prediction

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity, fitness, or capabilities

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative comparison against peers or standards

label: Framework Factor
definition: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistic or factual market context

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment from Aberdeen analyst

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Systematic analysis of industry structure and dynamics

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Detailed comparison of competing entities

label: Benchmarking
definition: Comparison against industry standards or peers

label: Field Research
definition: Primary data collection via interviews or surveys

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of existing documents and records

label: Expert Opinion Method
definition: Qualitative professional judgment methodology

label: High Confidence
definition: Strong evidentiary basis; multiple corroborating sources

label: Medium Confidence
definition: Reasonable basis but limited corroboration

label: Low Confidence
definition: Directional judgment with limited evidence

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events or independent sources

label: Emerging
definition: Technology newly entering the market at time of study

label: Mature
definition: Technology at peak adoption at time of study

label: Declining
definition: Technology losing market share at time of study

label: Obsolete
definition: Technology no longer in active use today

label: Active
definition: Technology still in active use today

label: Legacy Supported
definition: Technology maintained for backward compatibility but not actively developed
